label: Thing set maker params
description: Generation parameters passed to a ThingSetMaker at runtime or baked into a maker node via fixedParams. Used by ThingSetMakerDef.debugParams and ThingSetMaker.fixedParams.

techLevel.label: Tech level
techLevel.description: Maximum allowed tech level. Things whose tech level exceeds this value are excluded (source keeps x.techLevel <= techLevel).

countRange.label: Count range
countRange.description: Number of items to generate, selected randomly from this range. Accepts both min~max and single integer.

filter.label: Filter
filter.description: ThingFilter that restricts which ThingDefs are eligible for generation.

qualityGenerator.label: Quality generator
qualityGenerator.description: Quality distribution curve applied when assigning quality to generated things.

maxTotalMass.label: Max total mass
maxTotalMass.description: Maximum combined mass (kg) of all generated things. Null means unlimited.

maxThingMarketValue.label: Max thing market value
maxThingMarketValue.description: Maximum market value of any single generated thing. Used to exclude high-value items.

allowNonStackableDuplicates.label: Allow non-stackable duplicates
allowNonStackableDuplicates.description: Whether the same non-stackable ThingDef may appear more than once in the generated set. Null means game default.

minSingleItemMarketValuePct.label: Min single item market value pct
minSingleItemMarketValuePct.description: Minimum market value of a single item as a fraction of the total target market value. Prevents generating many tiny cheap items.

totalMarketValueRange.label: Total market value range
totalMarketValueRange.description: Target total market value range for the generated set. Accepts both min~max and single value.

totalNutritionRange.label: Total nutrition range
totalNutritionRange.description: Target total nutrition range for the generated set. Used by ThingSetMaker_Nutrition.

podContentsType.label: Pod contents type
podContentsType.description: Preset contents type for ancient pod generation. Selects a predefined loot profile.

makingFaction.label: Making faction
makingFaction.description: FactionDef of the faction that is producing this item set. Affects faction-specific loot restrictions.

traderDef.label: Trader def
traderDef.description: TraderKindDef context for generating trader stock sets.

tile.label: Tile
tile.description: Planet tile ID (or tileId,layerId pair) used for biome-aware generation. Leave blank unless biome context is needed.
